description: StreamData model. Defines the abstract CkArchive base, CkRawArchive (instant measurements), CkRollupArchive (derived bucketed-aggregation archives), and supporting enum/record types. The 1.1.0 → 1.2.0 bump renames the de-facto raw archive from CkArchive to CkRawArchive and marks CkArchive itself abstract; an embedded migration rewrites existing entities. Loaded only when StreamData is enabled at the instance level.
